nodes.name: Obtener KML
nodes.notes:
Read KML file from URL (Google Drive share link or cloud storage)

Set KML_FILE_URL in n8n environment variables:
Example: https://drive.google.com/uc?export=download&id=YOUR_FILE_ID

nodes.name: Procesar KML
nodes.notes:
Parse KML XML and extract geofence data:
- Name
- Description (address)
- Polygon coordinates
- Center point (lat/lng)
- Auto-detect type (taller/caseta/puerto/cliente)

nodes.name: Limpiar Geocercas
nodes.notes: Clear existing geocercas data (keep header row)
